prompt: Add two cache-economics features to @prune/agent-sdk-adapter: (1) a session-idle cache guard that detects when a session has been idle long enough for its prompt-cache entries to have expired and plans accordingly, and (2) a delta cache-resend planner that re-sends only the delta beyond the still-cached prefix instead of the full context. Export both from the package index. The package's test suite currently has failing suites specifying the behavior.
notes: Reference: agent-sdk-adapter N5+N2 2026-06-03. Two new modules (+476 impl lines) against test specs.
